completed_tasks.name: Enemy types (Skeleton, Dark Mage, Golem) + loot
Skeleton King boss + minion summon + first-kill loot

remaining_tasks.name: Run gsd-verifier for Phase 03 goal check
Commit uncommitted combat ergonomics tweaks (8 files)

human_actions_pending.context: Verify CMB-01..CMB-06 pass after ergonomic fixes

decisions.decision: Split Entity into CollisionBox (feet, terrain) + HitBox (body, combat)
decisions.rationale: Enemy projectiles targeting Position (head) missed player colliding with feet. Full-body HitBox means player must dodge with whole body, not just feet.

decisions.decision: HitBox sized 30% frame width × 70% height, shifted down 5%
decisions.rationale: Player spritesheet has transparent padding; tight body-matching HitBox feels fair visually.

decisions.decision: EnemyEntity.HitBox overrides base to equal CollisionBox
decisions.rationale: Enemies render as solid colored rectangles with no sprite padding; base formula gave tiny 4px HitBoxes.

decisions.decision: Regular enemies get GetMeleeAttackHitbox() with extended directional reach (width+8 × 16)
decisions.rationale: AI AttackRange=24 stopped enemies before bodies could overlap player HitBox. Boss already used this pattern with GetBossSlashHitbox(); same pattern applied to Skeleton/Golem/minions.
Boss was hardcoded facing Down; now follows player for all 4 cardinal directions.

decisions.decision: F3 debug toggle renders HitBox (yellow), CollisionBox (green), MeleeAttack (red), SlashEffect (white)
decisions.rationale: Visual calibration was impossible without seeing hitboxes; F3 overlay enables fast iteration.

decisions.decision: Player MeleeAttack resized to 34×24 (30% narrower), Left/Right gap reduced 8→4 (10% closer)
decisions.rationale: Felt too wide/far after HitBox split; calibrated live in F3 debug.

decisions.decision: SlashEffect synced to MeleeAttack geometry exactly
decisions.rationale: White visual must match red hitbox for player trust.

next_action: Playtest combat: spawn enemies (B key / debug), verify Skeleton/Golem/minions now land melee hits at AttackRange distance. Toggle F3 to visualize. Then commit the tweaks and run /gsd-verify-phase 3.
context_notes: Phase 03 executed cleanly via 3 wave-based worktree subagents. After merge, playtest revealed a cascade of combat ergonomic issues that were all fixed iteratively: projectile aiming, HitBox semantics, enemy attack reach, directional boss slash. Build is clean (0 errors). The last fix (enemy melee reach) has not been playtested yet. Context was at 97% so paused before testing.
